messages.content: # Do you want to change your car color to stand out from the rest? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Join a server > Click on the Settings Icon in the top right > Click Change Car Color
> 
> **Warning: "Toggle UI" must be enabled**

## 🚨 VR Users Warning 🚨 
> To fix the color menu staying inside of the cockpit, while the camera is pulled out into third person, please do the following:
> 
> Go to Content Manager -> Settings -> Custom Shaders Patch -> "Mode Tweaks: VR" -> Custom VR HUD Rendering 
> 
> Please tick both **"active" and the "move with other camera modes"** boxes.

# Reset color
> 1. Go to __Documents\Assetto Corsa\cfg\extension\state\lua__
> 
> 2. Open with NotePad __shared-NoHesiUI_Saves__
> 
> 3. Delete the lines with "__paintQueue__"
